arts.ttl: Philippe Clement WILL get until end of the season as Rangers boss definitive sack deadline laid bare
arts.sum: The boss has endured a rollercoaster campaign in the ibrox hot seat to this point

arts.ttl: Rangers starlet Cole McKinnon bids to make Ayr United statement under Scott Brown
arts.sum: The Ibrox Academy product is on board with the Honest Men for their title push.

arts.ttl: Igamane will leave Rangers but 'not in near future'
arts.sum: Rangers manager Philippe Clement says striker Hamza Igamane will eventually leave Rangers but "not in the near future".

arts.ttl: Philippe Clement fires Rangers transfer warning to Ibrox board over Hamza Igamane
arts.sum: The striker has been in blistering form and already being tipped with a potential big money Ibrox exit

arts.ttl: Cyriel Dessers sees Rangers transfer escape route open up as Italian strugglers 'evaluate' bargain buy
arts.sum: The frontman is struggling for regular game time at Ibrox this term

arts.ttl: Player now ‘considered transferable’ by Rangers and Philippe Clement – Multiple clubs lining up
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Italian media that Cagliari are one of a number of clubs showing interest in Rangers attacker Cyriel Dessers. The Belgian forward has been a regular in Philippe Clement’s starting eleven this season, but could still see himself being offloaded by the Ibrox club this month. Rudy Galetti has reported on The post Player now ‘considered transferable’ by Rangers and Philippe Clement – Multiple clubs lining up appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Richard King on Rangers transfer radar as move for giant Jamaican pondered amid central defensive crisis
arts.sum: The Light Blues are in the market for a central defender but for both the short and long term, with the Reggae Boyz star under consideration

arts.ttl: Clement defends injury record as depleted Rangers prepare to face Dundee
arts.sum: Philippe Clement has defended his injury record at Rangers as he surveyed his depleted squad ahead of the game against Dundee, live on Sky Sports.

arts.ttl: Philippe Clement insists Rangers injury crisis is NOTHING compared to last year as he makes bold claim
arts.sum: The Belgian vowed to make regular injuries a thing of the past and claims that is being done despite a raft of absentees

arts.ttl: Philippe Clement leaving Rangers red flags for his boss to count and he won’t last one more crash – Keith Jackson
arts.sum: Rangers face Dundee at Dens Park on Thursday night and the side has an atrocious away record
